reviews.comment:
Bien los playeros. Pero te enganchan con una promo de descuento en cambio de aceite y tenés que pelear te con todos para que te la hagan. Media hora después y una ardua discusión, pido factura A, no sabés parecía que le había pedido que me donará un riñón. Otra media hora. Si andás con ganas de pelear es el lugar

(Translated by Google)
The guys at the gas station were fine. But they lure you in with a discount promo on oil changes, and you have to fight everyone to get it done. Half an hour later, after a heated argument, I asked for an invoice (type A). You wouldn't believe how I felt asking them to donate a kidney. Another half hour. If you're in the mood for a fight, this is the place to be.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURjZ01IVlFnEAE
